categories.label: Hero pool photo
categories.composition: Wide angle, clean sparkling pool in foreground, bright sky or lush landscaping behind. No people required but optional. No green or cloudy water.
categories.notes: This is the most important image. Must convey "clean, clear, resort-quality." Avoid stock-looking staged images.

categories.label: Before and after pool cleaning
categories.composition: Side-by-side or sequential shots showing the same pool before (algae, cloudy) and after (crystal clear). Consistent angle and framing.
categories.notes: Green pool recovery before/after is especially high-converting for this niche.

categories.label: Technician servicing pool
categories.composition: Technician in branded uniform using equipment (pole, vacuum, test kit). Professional and competent appearance. No messy backgrounds.
categories.notes: Builds credibility. Must show branded uniform if possible.

categories.label: Pool equipment and machinery
categories.composition: Pump, filter, heater equipment. Clean and well-maintained. Good for repair service pages.

categories.label: Owner or team photos
categories.composition: Chest up, professional but approachable. Neutral or pool/outdoor background. Direct eye contact with camera.
categories.notes: Humanizes the business. Critical for the About page founder section.

categories.label: Finished pool service results
categories.composition: Crystal clear pool water, varied angles. Residential settings. Shows the quality of finished work.
